title: gomphrena radicata
intro: Gomphrena radicata, also known as Red Star or Globe Amaranth, is a type of flowering plant in the amaranth family that is native to tropical regions of Central and South America. Gomphrena radicata has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Gomphrena radicata include its ability to support immune function, reduce oxidative stress, and promote healthy digestion. Gomphrena radicata is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or dried herb for consumption, and can also be used topically in the form of a poultice or salve.
